title: Snapshot of a workdoc for weekly meetings
excerpt:

posts.author: a_zinman (Adam Zinman)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Monday team,

I’m looking for a feature to take a snapshot of a workdoc for a weekly meeting and store it in the files column. The team can then easily open the workdoc for that week and see the historical snapshot for that point in time. I would prefer not to have the export it to pdf.

Cheers,
Adam
